Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input id="searchKeyBox1549309958" placeholder="SÃ¸k" type="text"><input id="searchButton1549309958" type="button" value=" "/></input>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input id="searchKeyBox1712941047" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input id="searchKeyBox1092862708" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

Hardanger og Voss UngdomsrÃ¥d - Hardanger

https://www.hardanger.com/hardangerr%C3%A5det/hardanger-og-voss-ungdomsr%C3%A5d
Avvik: 255 | Bestått: 406
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (24 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="xh439966079 font1337907575" id="xhi343495554">HARDANGER OG VOSS UNGDOMSRÃD</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4 class="xh499130647 xpmm499130647 font100004">Â Hardanger UngdomsTING: Innkalling og MÃ¸tebÃ¸ker</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4 class="xh499130647 font100004" id="xhi1141345317">Uttalar frÃ¥ Hardanger UngdomsrÃ¥d </h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input id="searchKeyBox1549309958" placeholder="SÃ¸k" type="text"><input id="searchButton1549309958" type="button" value=" "/></input>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input id="searchKeyBox1712941047" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input id="searchKeyBox1092862708" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

Aktivitet og prosjekt - Hardanger

https://www.hardanger.com/hardangerr%C3%A5det/aktivitet-og-prosjekt
Avvik: 82 | Bestått: 207
2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body class="xp192226218 page594480632 lid1640797864" id="xmain"> <form action="/hardangerrÃ¥det/aktivitet-og-prosjekt" enctype="multipart/form-data" id="Form" method="post"><input name="Form" type="h
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (23 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="xh439966079 font1337907575" id="xhi1564400488">AKTIVITET OG PROSJEKT</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="xh499130647 font100004" id="xhi266538470">Hardangerkonferansen 2025</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav><ul class="MenuItem97321878 reset"><li class="font2016622220"><a href="http://www.hardangerfjord.com" target="_blank"><span class="c">TOURIST</span></a></li></ul></nav>
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)

Page is missing h1 heading

CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input id="searchKeyBox1549309958" placeholder="SÃ¸k" type="text"><input id="searchButton1549309958" type="button" value=" "/></input>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input id="searchKeyBox1712941047" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input id="searchKeyBox1092862708" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

Etablerartenesta - Hardanger

https://www.hardanger.com/flytt-til-hardanger/etablerartenesta
Avvik: 80 | Bestått: 184

https://www.hardanger.com/hardangerr%C3%A5det/aktivitet-og-prosjekt/kompetanse

Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input id="searchKeyBox1549309958" placeholder="SÃ¸k" type="text"><input id="searchButton1549309958" type="button" value=" "/></input>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input id="searchKeyBox1712941047" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input id="searchKeyBox1092862708" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id

<input id="searchKeyBox1092862708" type="text"/>

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input id="searchKeyBox1549309958" placeholder="SÃ¸k" type="text"><input id="searchButton1549309958" type="button" value=" "/></input>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input id="searchKeyBox1712941047" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input id="searchKeyBox1092862708" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

Kvam herad - Hardanger

https://www.hardanger.com/flytt-til-hardanger/flytt-til-hardanger/om-hardanger/kommunane/kvam-herad
Avvik: 79 | Bestått: 192

Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input id="searchKeyBox1549309958" placeholder="SÃ¸k" type="text"><input id="searchButton1549309958" type="button" value=" "/></input>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input id="searchKeyBox1712941047" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input id="searchKeyBox1092862708" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

Testreglene er basert på UU-tilsynets offisielle testregler

🔄 Start ny skanning

https://www.hardanger.com
1-500

Kopier kommandoen:

python checker.py https://www.hardanger.com --max-pages 21 --format html
